member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Configuration.ConfigurationManager
member.summary: Manages company configuration export and import operations using the .companyconfig format. Supports optional AES encryption.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Configuration.ConfigurationManager.ExportConfigAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.String)
member.summary: Exports the configuration object to a .companyconfig file.
member.param: The target file path to write to.
Optional key to encrypt the configuration content.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Configuration.ConfigurationManager.ImportConfigAsync``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Imports configuration from a .companyconfig file.
member.param: The source file path to read from.
Optional key used to decrypt the configuration content.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Notifications.NotificationEngine
member.summary: A high-performance, asynchronous notification queue engine that dispatches messages to various notification services.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Notifications.NotificationEngine.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.INotificationService},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Platform.Notifications.NotificationEngine})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Notifications.NotificationEngine.Start
member.summary: Starts the background notification processing loop.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Notifications.NotificationEngine.Stop
member.summary: Stops the background notification processing loop.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Notifications.NotificationEngine.QueueNotificationAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Queues a new notification message.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Packages.PackageManager
member.summary: Manages validation, checksum verification, and cryptographic signature checking on enterprise package distributions.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Packages.PackageManager.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Platform.Packages.PackageManager})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Packages.PackageManager.ComputeChecksum(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the SHA256 checksum of a package file.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Packages.PackageManager.VerifyPackageSignature(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies the cryptographic RSA signature of a package's hash.
member.param: The path to the package file.
The base64-encoded signature of the package hash.
The RSA public key in PEM format.
member.returns: True if the signature is valid; otherwise false.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Plugins.PluginLoader
member.summary: Dynamically loads plugin assemblies and instantiates implementation types.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Plugins.PluginLoader.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Platform.Plugins.PluginLoader})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Plugins.PluginLoader.LoadPlugins``1(System.String)
member.summary: Scan and load instances of type from assembly files in the specified directory.
member.typeparam: The interface or contract type to discover.
member.param: The absolute path to the plugins directory.
member.returns: A sequence of instantiated plugin components.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Recovery.RecoveryManager
member.summary: Manages disaster recovery operations by backing up and restoring database states using compressed and encrypted .drpack files.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Recovery.RecoveryManager.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Platform.Recovery.RecoveryManager})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Recovery.RecoveryManager.CreateBackupAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Backs up the database file to an encrypted .drpack file.
member.param: Path to the active SQLite/SQL Server local DB file, or database backup source.
Key used to encrypt the backup package.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Recovery.RecoveryManager.RestoreBackupAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Decrypts and restores the database file from a .drpack package.
member.param: Key used to decrypt the package.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler
member.summary: A thread-safe, robust background scheduler that processes daily, weekly, fortnightly, monthly, quarterly, yearly, and manual tasks.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler.RegisterJob(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Registers or updates a scheduled background job.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler.TriggerJob(System.String)
member.summary: Triggers a registered job immediately.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler.Start
member.summary: Starts the scheduler background loop.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Scheduler.BackgroundScheduler.Stop
member.summary: Stops the scheduler background loop.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager
member.summary: Controls system-wide state transactions, managing locked periods, double-payment guards, and system maintenance modes.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager.IsMaintenanceMode
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the system is in maintenance mode.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager.IsPeriodLocked(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a pay period is locked for changes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager.LockPeriod(System.Int32)
member.summary: Locks a pay period.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager.UnlockPeriod(System.Int32)
member.summary: Unlocks a pay period.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager.TryAcquireOperationLock(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to acquire an exclusive lock on an operation to prevent double execution (e.g. processing same bank file twice).
member.returns: True if the lock was successfully acquired; false if it's already active.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.State.StateManager.ReleaseOperationLock(System.String)
member.summary: Releases an exclusive lock on an operation.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Platform.Versions.VersionManager
member.summary: Manages system-wide engine versions and allows pinning versions for individual payroll runs to guarantee reproducibility.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Versions.VersionManager.GetCurrentPlatformVersions
member.summary: Gets the current baseline versions of the running platform engines.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Versions.VersionManager.PinVersionsForRun(System.Int32,FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.VersionContract)
member.summary: Pins the engine versions for a specific payroll run.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Platform.Versions.VersionManager.GetVersionsForRun(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the pinned versions for a specific payroll run, fallback to current platform versions if not pinned.
